title: Aurin's ShinobiCraft Eyes
description: Enhanced AHZNB's ShinobiCraft Eyes (and some addons eyes too)...
body:
A resourcepack made to give a HD appearence to AHZNB's ShinobiCraft Eyes, and some addons eyes too.

![Sharingan](https://i.imgur.com/O1hqyvA.png)

The resourcepack at the moment have:
- Sharingan Redone;
- Mangekyou Sharingan Redone (all variations);
- Byakugan Redone.

And all the items icons of them aswell...
